name: Mistral Large 2 (24.07)
license: Mistral Research License (non-commercial; commercial license required for production)
note: 123B open-weights flagship rivaling Llama 3.1 405B on code/math (research license); fully retired from Mistral's API as of 2025.
tpsNote: 123B model exceeds a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM even at Q4; requires multi-GPU or CPU offload.
verificationNotes: Real release confirmed via mistral.ai/news/mistral-large-2407/ (fetched): 123B dense, 128k ctx, released 2024-07-24, Mistral Research License (HF model card literally says 'Mistral AI Research License' / license tag 'mrl', non-commercial). All 4 result rows independently confirmed literally present on their cited pages: MMLU 84.0 (mistral.ai blog), HumanEval 92%, MBPP Base 80%, GSM8K 93% (all on HF model card, also corroborated by an independent MarkTechPost article).
